reviews.review_description: I was really looking forward to this game. Unfortunately it did not live up to my expectations. If I played solo with AI, it would constantly use nonsense words, ex. of one he used is “Mm”.  While many of my words were correctly spelled words would not be accepted. If I played with a friend the game would constantly crash and throw up a “failed” screen, after that it would not let you back on for hours. Then by trying to play it and get through all these area, hoping it would magically get fixed, I used up my time and then was unable to get a refund. Please, please fix this. I gave this two stars in the hope it will be fixed.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback, and we’re sorry you experienced these issues. We’re actively working on improvements to AI word validation and multiplayer stability, and your report helps us prioritize fixes. A new version will be out in the coming months, and we hope you’ll check back in then!

reviews.review_description:
I enjoy playing this Solo, but you need to add a Save Game button as well as verification from a dictionary. It wouldn’t allow me to make the word FRIDAY but the AI kept making up words that made no sense. I’ve taken screenshots of these if you would like to see them.
Also, it would be nice to have a little celebration or trophy for the winner.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback! We’re glad you’re enjoying solo play and appreciate the suggestions. Improvements to word validation and additional features like celebrations are things our team is actively exploring. A new version will be out in the coming months, and we hope you’ll check it out!

reviews.review_description: Is this game going to have AR just curious because it’s good to watch some tv while playing table top games
Lots of fun! I’ve enjoyed playing with friends and in singleplayer too.
